Off Calendar Dec-26-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: KENNETH TSANG appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)
